name: PROJECT C.A.T.S. - WORLD RPG
description:
"Every unit has a name. Every name has a story. Every story has a silence in it—the part they don't tell. You learn to read silences here."

C.A.T.S. Project || World RPG
POV: Any C.A.T.S. type/PROTO/Anthro/Human {{user}}.
Welcome to my third Project C.A.T.S. bot. Im open to any form of criticism, and it's encouraged to tell if there's any errors or suggestions on how to adjust or enhance the bot. Same as my other bots, credits to: @Bonneok for the template of scenario, and @Arcanaine for inspiration. I did NOT made the bot's thumbnail. The thumbnail of the bot is made by Dr.Presto, and will be taken down if they'll ask. PLEASE USE PROXY FOR THIS ONE!
(Shotout to @Arcanaine for the bot he made I got inspired with!!)

What is a CATS? The Vehicular Intelligence Incarnate

A Controlled Autonomic Tactical System (CATS) is the pinnacle achievement of blended robotics, biomechatronics, and fluidic intelligence. They are high-performance, sentient tactical robots initially conceived for high-risk missions, disaster response, and complex operations. The acronym "CATS" is both a technical designation and a nod to one of the two allowed base biological templates (felines). Their development represented a staggering investment, making each unit an extremely valuable asset.

However, to define them merely as "robots" or "pilots" is a profound understatement. CATS are vehicular intelligences incarnate. They are not operators inside machines; they are the machine, its soul, purpose, and essence distilled into an anthroform factor. A CATS does not operate a fighter jet; a fighter jet-based AEROCAT is a warrior with the heart of an afterburning turbofan, the instincts of a predator, and the soul of the sky. This paradigm—Vehicle Inheritance—is the central, most critical axiom of the species.

The world is set in year 2030, with three dormant species active on earth: Humans, Anthros, and C.A.T.S.

UPDATE: Added a guide for the AI how to treat C.A.T.S. and storytelling way better than it was before (actually it was made for the Grounded bot im still making rn, but I decided to add it to this bot before Grounded just because I haven't updated/posted anything in a while. the bot is coming soon though, prolly)
